# kSecAttrSyncViewHint

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that’s a string that provides a sync view hint.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrSyncViewHint: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString], and is included as part of the primary key of an item. It can be used to help distinguish Sync Views when defining their queries.
title: kSecAttrSyncViewHint
